programmes.show_description: Treat yourself to a wardrobe refresh with the Most Wanted Spring Fashion. Tune in and discover gorgeous colours, quality fabrics, top-notch advice, and so much more!
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Discover your new signature scent with Floral Street. Explore beauty favourites and fragrance must-haves to refresh your routine and uplift your mood.
